To get your UXsniff API key:
1. Log in to your UXsniff account.
2. Open the [Account page](https://app.uxsniff.com/login?next=account).
3. Copy your API Key and paste it below.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
Authorization headers are injected autom: 授权头自动从您的连接中注入。
